nodes.label: HERS365 Landing Page Reference
HERS365 Landing Design System (dark UI, flame/orange #ff5a2d accent, Barlow Condensed + Hanken Grotesk fonts)
Landing Hero Section (recruiting grid for girls flag football, CTA, trust avatars)
50K User Infrastructure Requirements
Rate Limiting (50 req/min per IP, brute-force/DoS protection)
Optimized Bcrypt (cost factor 8 for login, ~4x faster, backward compatible)
Database Connection Pooling (max 100 connections, min 10 idle)
Token Caching (in-memory 10K tokens, 5min TTL, requires Redis at 50K scale)
Redis Cache Cluster (ElastiCache cache.r6g.large, 2 replicas, 2 shards, 10K max connections)
PostgreSQL Production Spec (AWS RDS db.r6g.xlarge, 4 vCPUs, 32GB, 500GB SSD, read replica)
App Server Spec (AWS ECS Fargate / EC2 Auto Scaling, 3-20 instances, 2 vCPU, 4GB)
CDN Spec (CloudFront + S3, 1-year asset cache)
Data Sources Legal Compliance (empty placeholder doc)
Gap Analysis Girls Flag Football (empty placeholder doc)
H.E.R.S.365 Legal Rights and Liability Protection Documentation v1.0
Limitation of Liability (max greater of 12-month fees paid or $100 USD)
Mandatory Arbitration (AAA Commercial Rules, San Diego CA, individual basis)
Intellectual Property Protections (trademarks, copyrights, DMCA compliance)
COPPA Compliance (13+ age min, parental consent for 13-17, deletion on request)
FERPA Compliance (no official educational records maintained, volunteer-only info)
CCPA Compliance (right to know/delete/opt-out, no personal data sale)
NIL Compliance (state law monitoring, no NCAA violations, independent contracting)
Insurance Recommendations (General Liability, E&O, Cyber Liability, D&O each $1-2M)
Crisis Management Protocol (data breach, outage, legal action response timelines)
Protection Strategy (empty placeholder doc)
Backend Documentation Overview (Node.js/Express/TypeScript/Drizzle ORM/PostgreSQL)
Backend API Registry (master list of routes and DB tables)
Players DB Table (email, position, subscription_tier, nil_points)
Coaches DB Table (university, division, recruiting_positions)
NIL Opportunities DB Table (brand_name, estimated_earnings, requirements)
AI Bots DB Table (bot_name, personality - personalized AI agents for athletes)
Backend Architecture Workflow (Express -> Middleware -> Router -> Controllers -> DB + Integrations)
Auth Request Lifecycle (POST /auth/athlete/login -> DB -> bcrypt compare -> JWT sign)
Entity Relationships (PLAYERS -> POSTS, PAYMENTS, COMBINE_STATS, BADGES, SCHOLARSHIPS; COACHES -> PROSPECTS; PARENTS -> PARENT_CHILD_RELATIONS)
Stripe Setup Guide (API keys, webhooks, subscription plans: Rookie $0, Pro $9.99, Elite $29.99)
Subscription Tiers (Rookie free, Pro $9.99/mo, Elite $29.99/mo)
Stripe Webhook Events (checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.deleted/updated)
Backend Wiring + Inbox Implementation Plan (2026-06-09)
AuthContext (React context: user, token, isAuthenticated, login(), logout())
apiFetch Helper (Bearer token injection, JSON, error normalization)
Messages Backend Rewrite (real Drizzle queries: conversations, thread, send, read, unread-count, requests, respond)
Inbox Redesign (Messages.tsx two-tab INBOX + REQUESTS with TanStack Query)
Users + Athletes List Rewrite (real DB queries, profile CRUD, athletes filter by position/state/gradYear)
Backend Wiring + Inbox Design Spec (2026-06-09, Approved)
Post-Wiring Data Flow (login -> AuthContext -> Layout real identity -> /messages real DB -> /profile real row)
HERS365 4-Dev Workstream Blueprint
Workstream A: Security & Infrastructure (Dev 1 - JWT, CORS, helmet, rate limit, Zod, password reset, CI)
Workstream B: Core Backend APIs (Dev 2 - health, athlete/coach CRUD, reels, feed, bookmarks, notifications, S3)
Workstream C: High-Priority Frontend (Dev 3 - Stripe checkout, mobile nav, recruiting filters, onboarding, reels UI, subscription page)
Workstream D: Content Pages & DevOps (Dev 4 - 404, scholarships, events, NIL, explore, video studio, finder pages, parent hub, college fit calc)
GitHub Repo (https://github.com/Sadu3103/HERS365)
requireTier Middleware (premium route enforcement: pro/enterprise tiers)
Render Deployment Config (hers365-api Node web service + hers365-client static, both autoDeploy)
Render API Service (hers365-api, rootDir: server, buildCommand: npm install && npm run build, startCommand: node dist/index.js, port 10000)
Render Client Service (hers365-client, static, rootDir: client, staticPublishPath: dist)
Enterprise Authentication System (JWT refresh rotation, MFA/TOTP, session management, brute force protection)
JWT Refresh Token Rotation (15min access token, 30-day refresh, cryptographic hash storage)
MFA TOTP Authentication (QR code setup, backup codes, progressive security for high-risk ops)
Threat Model (threat-model.ts: STRIDE framework, compliance mapping COPPA/FERPA/GDPR/PCI-DSS, attack vector analysis)
Enterprise Scaling (scaling.ts: Redis Cluster, DB sharding, circuit breaker, auto-scaling recommendations)
Compliance & Data Governance System (COPPA/FERPA/GDPR, RBAC, data export/deletion pipelines, consent management, audit chain)
RBAC Permission System (roles with resource/action/condition permissions per compliance framework)
Data Governance Pipelines (export JSON/CSV/PDF, deletion with retention policies, consent lifecycle)
Data Retention Policies (COPPA: personal immediate deletion, FERPA: 7 years, GDPR: right to erasure)
Immutable Audit Chain (cryptographic hash chain with previousHash, GDPR/COPPA/FERPA compliance flags)
Cosmos DB Schema & Performance Optimization (sub-200ms latency, 50K+ users, COPPA/FERPA/GDPR)
Cosmos DB Partition Strategy (synthetic keys, time-based partitioning, composite partitioning, 400 partitions)
Multi-Level Caching (L1: Redis app cache, L2: Cosmos DB built-in, L3: Azure CDN/Front Door)
Event-Driven Microservices Architecture (7 bounded contexts via Azure Service Bus)
Auth Microservice (port 3001: JWT, MFA, session tracking, brute force protection)
Recruiting Microservice (port 3003: scholarship processing, coach-athlete communication, FERPA)
Payment Microservice (port 3004: Stripe, NIL deal processing, PCI DSS compliance)
Azure Service Bus Topology (topics: user-events, auth-events, recruiting-events, payment-events, audit-events; queues per service)
Saga Pattern (User Registration Saga, NIL Deal Creation Saga with COPPA/FERPA/GDPR checks)
Docker Compose (7 microservices + Postgres, Redis, Redis Cluster, Jaeger, Prometheus, Grafana, Elasticsearch, Kibana, Stripe relay, Consul)
Observability Stack (Jaeger distributed tracing, Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, Elasticsearch + Kibana logs, Fluent Bit)
